name: Old Bank Golf
about: Old Bank Golf is a golf simulator venue located in Russellville, Arkansas, adjacent to The Old Bank Sports Grill. It features two open bays equipped with state-of-the-art golf simulator technology, offering a comprehensive indoor golf experience. The venue provides access to over 1,500 golf courses, family-friendly mini-games, and advanced swing analytics, creating an environment suitable for both casual players and those looking to improve their game. With its full-service restaurant and bar, patrons can enjoy a complete experience that combines golf simulation with dining and socializing.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to over 1,500 global golf courses
Advanced swing analytics for skill improvement
Integration with a full-service restaurant and bar

food_and_drink.notes: Full restaurant menu available, including signature dishes like the Stanley Cup Burger
Selection of beverages available to enjoy while playing

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue provides all necessary equipment including clubs, so you do not need to bring your own.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are not permitted, as the venue offers a full menu and bar with a variety of options.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Playing 18 holes typically takes about 1-2 hours depending on the number of players and pace of play.

faq.question: Is Old Bank Golf kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is family-friendly and offers mini-games suitable for children, making it a great option for families.
